POLÍTICA DE PRIVACIDAD Y PROTECCIÓN DE D.ar: سياسات الحماية ووفقاً لأحكام القانون 1581 لعام 2012 ومراسيمه القانونية المتعلقة بحماية البيانات الشخصية، التي تنظم حق المعلومات في جمع البيانات، نبلغكم بما يلي: - ستعالج البيانات الشخصية التي قدمتموها لنا في هذه الرسائل وغيرها من الرسائل التي تحتفظ بها معكم (المركز) في الملفات المسؤولة عن المجموعة 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. - الغرض من العلاج هو إدارة الخدمة التي طلبتها بشكل صحيح وبالإضافة إلى ذلك، لا تُنقل هذه البيانات إلى أطراف ثالثة، إلا في حالات الإحالة المسموح بها قانوناً. - والبيانات المطلوبة عن طريق هذه الاتصالات وغيرها من البلاغات هي بيانات إلزامية لتوفير الخدمات. وهي مناسبة ومناسبة وغير مفرطة. - رفضك تقديم البيانات المطلوبة يعني أنك غير قادر على تقديم الخدمة - كما نحيطكم علما بإمكانية ممارسة الحقوق المناظرة في الوصول إلى الخدمات والترفيه والإلغاء والمعارضة وفقا لأحكام القانون 1581 لعام 2012 أمام المجموعة 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. بوصفها مسؤولة عن إدارة البيانات المقدمة هنا. ويمكن ممارسة الحقوق المذكورة أعلاه بالبريد الإلكتروني:

. ​POLÍTICA MANEJO DE INFORMACIÓN Y DATO.en: . TIMATIC MANAGEMENT OF PERSONAL INFORMATION AND DATA OF GROUP 1P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. Version: 1. Effective Date: April 2019. Last Update: February 2019. GENERALITIES This policy is defined in accordance with the entry into force of Statutory Law of which aims to adopt the general provisions for the protection of personal data and to develop the constitutional right of all persons to know, update and correct the information that has been collected on them in databases or archives as well as the right to information; therefore, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., taking into account their status as responsible for the processing of personal data that assists them, is allowed to formulate the present text in order to comply effectively with that regulation and in particular for the personal treatment and handling of the COLOMBIA. The right to HÁBEAS DATA is the right of everyone to know, update and correct the information that has been collected about it in archives and data banks of a public or private nature and guarantees all citizens the power to decide and control their personal information. Therefore, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. welcomes such provisions taking into account that, for the development of its social object, it is continuously collecting and performing various database treatments from both customers, shareholders, suppliers, commercial allies and employees. In accordance with the above, within the legal and corporate duty of GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. to protect the right to privacy of persons, as well as the power to know, update or request information about them in databases, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has designed the present policy of handling personal information and databases in which it describes and explains the processing of Personal Information to which it has access through our website, e-mail, physical information (invoices), text messages, voice messages, and other related, as well as in the face of the current, and other related, commercial, client-related, as in-face, as in-to-face, and-face-to-face, and-to-face, of-to-the-face, and-to-the-face, of-face, and-to-the-the-face, and-face, of-the-face, and-the-side, and-to-the-the-side,. This will be adjusted to the extent that the rules applicable to the subject matter are regulated and new provisions enter into force. GENERAL OBJECTIVE With the implementation of this policy, it is intended to ensure the reservation of information and the security of the treatment that will be given to it to all customers, suppliers, employees and third parties of whom GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has legally obtained information and personal data in accordance with the guidelines established by the law regulating the right to the Habeas Data. In addition, the issuance of this policy is in compliance with the provisions of article paragraph K, of the Act. DEFINITIONS 17. Authorization: Consent which, in advance, expresses and informs the holder of any personal data for the company to carry out the processing of its personal data. 2. Holder: natural person whose data are processed by the company. 2. Database: Personal data set. 3. Personal data: Information that is linked to a person. It is any piece of information linked to one or more specific or determinable persons or which may be associated with a natural or legal person. Personal data may be public, semi-private or private. 5. Treatment: Any operation or set of operations on personal data that may include collection, storage, use, circulation or suppression. 5. In charge of processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who, by himself or in association with others, does some personal data processing on behalf of the controller. 6. Responsible for processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who by himself or in association with others, decides on the basis of data and / or data processing. 7. Public data: This data is qualified as such in accordance with the mandates of the law or the Constitution. The data contained in public documents, enforceable court decisions which are not subject to reservation and those relating to the civil status of persons are public. 9. Semi-private data: It is semi-private data that is not of an intimate, reserved, or public nature and whose knowledge or dissemination may be of interest not only to its owner but to a certain sector or group of persons or to society at large, such as the financial and credit data of commercial activity. 10. Private data: It is the data that, by its intimate or reserved nature, is only relevant to the holder. 11. Sensitive data: those related to racial or ethnic origin, membership of trade unions, social or human rights organizations, political, religious, sexual, biometric or health data convictions. This information may not be granted by the holder of this data. 12. Privacy Notice: A physical, electronic document generated by the controller that is made available to the holder with information concerning the existence of the information processing policies that will apply to him, the way to access them and the characteristics of the treatment intended to give to the personal data. Any process involving the processing by any area of the personal data company of both customers, suppliers, employees and in general any third party with which GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. maintains commercial and labour relations shall take into account and inform it in an express and prior manner, by any means in which a record of its compliance can be kept, of the rights of that data holder, which are set out below: 1. The right to know, update, correct, consult your personal data at any time against GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. in respect of data that you consider partial, inaccurate, incomplete, fractionated and those that lead to error. 1. The right at any time to request proof of the authorisation granted to Grupo 2P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. 1. The right to be informed by GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. at the request of the data holder regarding the use it has given them. 3. The right to submit to the Superintendency of Industry and Commerce any complaints that it considers relevant to assert its right to the Habeas Data vis-à-vis the company. 4. The right to revoke the authorisation and / or request the deletion of any information where it considers that GROUP 5P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has not respected its constitutional rights and guarantees. 1. The right to free access to personal data that it voluntarily decides to share with GROUP 6P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., for which the company in support of the technology area is responsible for the safe and reliable storage and archiving of the authorization formats of each of the duly granted personal data holders. CASES IN WHICH GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. IS NOT REQUIRED FOR THE TREATMENT OF DATA IN THEIR POWER 1. Where the information is requested from the company by a public or administrative entity acting in the exercise of its legal or judicial functions. 1. In the case of public data because they are not protected by the scope of the rule. 2. Medical or health emergency events duly tested. 3. In those events where information is authorized by law to meet historical, statistical and scientific purposes. 4. In the case of data relating to the civil registration of persons because this information is not considered to be a data of a private nature. WHO CAN INTER INFORMATION BY GROUP 5P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. WITHOUT A NEED TO CONNECESSY WITH THE AUTHORISATION OF DATA PORTS · To the data holders, their heirs or representatives at any time and through any means upon request to GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. · To the judicial or administrative entities in the exercise of functions that raise a request to the company for the information to be given. · To third parties who are authorized by some law of the Republic of Colombia. · To the third parties to which the Data Holder expressly authorizes to deliver the information and whose authorization is given to GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. MUST HAVE GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. WITH REGARD TO THE DATA TEMPERS COLOMBIA S.A.S. recognizes that the personal data is the property of the data holders and that only such persons may decide on them. In this sense, it will use exclusively for those purposes for which it is empowered in the terms of the law and for the sake of the above, it is allowed to inform the duties it assumes as responsible for the treatment: 1. The company shall seek the means through which to obtain the express authorisation of the data holder to carry out any type of treatment. 1. The company shall inform its customers, employees, suppliers and third parties in general of those who obtain databases of the treatment to which they will be subjected and the purpose of such treatment. To this end, the company shall design the strategy through which for each event, mechanics or data request to be carried out, it shall inform them of the relevant processing. Some of these means can be the sending of text messages, the handling of physical formats, through the websites of Grupo 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. among others. 1. The company must inform the data holders on a case-by-case basis of the optional nature of responding and granting the information requested. 3. In all cases where data are collected, the rights of all holders in respect of their data shall be informed. 4. The company must inform the identification, physical or electronic address and telephone of the person or area that will be responsible for the treatment. 5. The company shall at all times ensure that the holder of the information, the full and effective exercise of the right to habeas data and on request, that is, the possibility to know the information on it or to rest in the database, to request the updating or correction of data and to process consultations, all of which shall be done through the consultation mechanisms or claims provided for in this policy. 7. The company shall keep the records of personal data stored with due certainty to prevent their deterioration, loss, alteration, unauthorized or fraudulent use and shall regularly and in a timely manner update and rectification of the data, each time the holders of the data report to it news or requests. FINALITIES IN THE CAPTURE, USE AND TREATMENT OF PERSONAL DATA GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. in the development of their social object and their relations with third parties, understand by these customers, employees, suppliers, creditors, strategic allies, among others; constantly collect data to carry out various purposes and uses within which can be framed: ● Administrative, commercial, promotional, information, marketing and sales purposes. ● To offer all kinds of commercial services; as well as to conduct promotional, marketing, advertising campaigns. ● Search for closer knowledge with all your customers, suppliers, employees and related third parties. In relation to the above, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. may implement the following actions: 1. To obtain, store, compile, exchange, update, collect, process, reproduce and / or dispose of the partial or total data or information of those holders who give you the appropriate authorization in the terms required by law and in such formats as you consider appropriate for each case. 2. Classify, order, separate the information provided by the data holder. 2. To carry out investigations, compare, verify and validate the data you obtain in due form with credit risk plants with which you have business relations. 3. Extend the information it obtains in the terms of the habeas data law to the companies with which it contracts the services of capture, storage and management of its previous databases the appropriate authorizations it obtains in that regard. 5. Transfer partial or total data or information to its subsidiaries, businesses, companies and / or affiliated entities and strategic allies. THE AUTHORISATION In order to carry out the above-mentioned purposes, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. requires free, prior, express and duly informed of the authorisation of the data holders and has provided for appropriate mechanisms to ensure for each case that it is possible to verify the granting of such authorisation. It may be recorded in any means, whether it is a physical, electronic document or in any format that ensures its subsequent consultation through technical, technological and computer security tools. The authorisation is a statement informing the data holder of the following information: ● Who is responsible for or responsible for collecting information ● Data collected ● Purpose of processing ● Procedure for the exercise of rights of access, correction, update or deletion of data ● Information on sensitive data collection. DATA RECOLLECTED BEFORE THE EXPEDITION OF THE DECENT 1377 OF 2013 In order to comply with article 9 of Law 9 of 1581, the persons responsible for the processing of personal data shall establish mechanisms to obtain the authorization of the holders or of those who are entitled under the terms of the Act. These mechanisms may be predetermined by technical means to facilitate the operator's automated demonstration. The authorisation may be granted in accordance with one of the following options: (i) in writing, (ii) verbally or (iii) by means of unequivocal conduct of the holder that allows the authorisation to be reasonably concluded. In no case can silence be assimilated to unambiguous conduct. Also, in accordance with article 10 of Decree 10 of 1377, GROUP 2013P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. published in newspapers of extended national circulation, the notice of privacy through which I communicate the existence of the present policy, informing the Superintendency of Industry and Commerce in this regard. As indicated in this Decree, if within thirty (30) working days of the implementation of the previous mechanism, the holders did not contact the RESPONSIBLE or ENCARGED to request the deletion of their personal data, the RESPONSIBLE and ENCARGED may continue to carry out the processing of personal data contained in their databases for the purpose or purposes envisaged and indicated in the information processing policy. PROTECTION OF PERSONAL DATA OF ENVIRONMENT AND ADOLEScent LEVEL In accordance with the provisions of Statutory Law 1581 of 1581 and Regulation Decree 2012 of 1377, GROUP 2013P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. He states that the processing of personal data of children and adolescents shall be carried out in respect of their rights, and that, in commercial and marketing activities carried out by Grupo 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., he shall have the prior, express and informed authorization of the father or mother or of the legal representative of the child or adolescent. A personal data holder has the right to consult and issue requests to the company regarding the handling and processing of his information. A). PROCEDURE FOR THE TRANSMIT OF CLAIMS OR REQUEST: Any application, request, complaint or claim (PQR) submitted to GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. by any holder or his / her reasons for the handling and treatment of his / her information shall be decided in accordance with the law regulating the right to have data and shall be processed under the following rules: 1. The request or claim shall be made by writing or any other means defined in this policy for this purpose, addressed to GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., with the identification of the holder, the description of the facts that give rise to the claim, the address or means through which it wishes to obtain its response, and, if necessary, accompanying the supporting documents that are to be made available. If the letter is incomplete, the company shall request the person concerned to correct the faults within five (5) days of receipt of the claim. After two months from the date of the request, without the applicant submitting the requested information, it shall be understood to have withdrawn the claim or request. 2. Once the request or full claim has been received, the company shall include in the individual register in a term not exceeding two (2) working days a legend that says\ "claim in process\" and the nature of it. Such information shall be maintained until the claim is decided. 3. The applicant shall receive a reply from GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. within 10 (10) working days from the date on which he has had effective knowledge of the application. 4. Where it is not possible to meet the request within that term, the person concerned shall be informed, expressing the reasons for the delay and indicating the date on which his request will be met, which in no case may exceed five (5) working days after the expiry of the first term. B). CONSULTATIONS: The policy on the management of personal information by Grupo 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. and the basic rights that the data holders have in relation to it may be consulted through the following means:
. ​POLÍTICA MANEJO DE INFORMACIÓN Y DATO.es: . ​POLÍTICA MANEJO DE INFORMACIÓN Y DATOS PERSONALES DE GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. Versión: 1Fecha entrada en Vigencia: abril de 2019.Última Actualización: Febrero de 2019. GENERALIDADES La presente política se define de conformidad con la entrada en vigencia de la Ley Estatutaria 1581 de 2012 la cual tiene por objeto dictar las disposiciones generales para la protección de datos personales y desarrollar el derecho constitucional que tienen todas las personas a conocer, actualizar y rectificar las informaciones que se hayan recogido sobre ellas en bases de datos o archivos así como el derecho a la información; por tanto, GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. teniendo en cuenta su condición de responsable del tratamiento de datos de carácter personal que le asiste, se permite formular el presente texto en aras de dar efectivo cumplimiento a dicha normatividad y en especial para la atención de consultas y reclamos acerca del tratamiento de los datos de carácter personal que recoja y maneje GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S.. El derecho al HÁBEAS DATA es aquel que tiene toda persona de conocer, actualizar y rectificar la información que se haya recogido sobre ella en archivos y bancos de datos de naturaleza pública o privada y le garantiza a todos los ciudadanos poder de decisión y control sobre su información personal. Por tanto, GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. acoge tales disposiciones teniendo en cuenta que, para el desarrollo de su objeto social, continuamente está recopilando y efectuando diversos tratamientos a bases de datos tanto de clientes, accionistas, proveedores, aliados comerciales y empleados. En virtud de lo anterior, dentro del deber legal y corporativo de GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. de proteger el derecho a la privacidad de las personas, así como la facultad de conocer, actualizar o solicitar la información que sobre ellas se archive en bases de datos, GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. ha diseñado la presente política de manejo de la información de carácter personal y bases de datos en la cual se describe y explica el tratamiento de la Información Personal a la que tiene acceso a través de nuestro sitio web, correo electrónico, información física (facturas), mensajes de texto, mensaje de voz, llamadas telefónicas, cara a cara, medios físicos o electrónicos, actuales o que en el futuro se desarrollen como otras comunicaciones enviadas así como por intermedio de terceros que participan en nuestra relación comercial o legal con todos nuestros clientes, empleados, proveedores, accionistas, aliados estratégicos y vinculados. La presente se irá ajustando en la medida en que se vaya reglamentando la normatividad aplicable a la materia y entren en vigencia nuevas disposiciones. OBJETIVO GENERAL Con la implementación de ésta política, se pretende garantizar la reserva de la información y la seguridad sobre el tratamiento que se le dará a la misma a todos los clientes, proveedores, empleados y terceros de quienes GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. ha obtenido legalmente información y datos personales conforme a los lineamientos establecidos por la ley regulatoria del derecho al Habeas Data. Asimismo, a través de la expedición de la presente política se da cumplimiento a lo previsto en el literal K del artículo 17 de la referida ley. DEFINICIONES 1. Autorización: Consentimiento que, de manera previa, expresa e informada emite el titular de algún dato personal para que la compañía lleve a cabo el tratamiento de sus datos personales. 2. Titular: persona natural cuyos datos son objeto de tratamiento por parte de la compañía. 3. Base de datos: Conjunto de datos personales. 4. Dato personal: Información que está vinculada a una persona. Es cualquier pieza de información vinculada a una o varias personas determinadas o determinables o que puedan asociarse con una persona natural o jurídica. Los datos personales pueden ser públicos, semiprivados o privados. 5. Tratamiento: Cualquier operación o conjunto de operaciones sobre datos personales dentro de las cuales se puede incluir su recolección, almacenamiento, uso, circulación o supresión. 6. Encargado del tratamiento: Persona natural o jurídica, pública o privada, que por sí misma o en asocio con otros, realiza algún tratamiento sobre datos personales por cuenta del responsable del tratamiento. 7. Responsable del tratamiento: Persona natural o jurídica, pública o privada, que por sí misma o en asocio con otros, decida sobre la base de datos y/o el tratamiento de los datos. 8. Dato público: Es aquel dato calificado como tal según los mandatos de la ley o de la Constitución Política. Son públicos, entre otros, los datos contenidos en documentos públicos, sentencias judiciales ejecutoriadas que no estén sometidas a reserva y los relativos al estado civil de las personas. 9. Dato semiprivado: Es semiprivado el dato que no tiene naturaleza íntima, reservada, ni pública y cuyo conocimiento o divulgación puede interesar no sólo a su titular sino a cierto sector o grupo de personas o a la sociedad en general, como el dato financiero y crediticio de actividad comercial. 10. Dato privado: Es el dato que por su naturaleza íntima o reservada sólo es relevante para el titular. 11. Dato sensible: aquellos relacionados con el origen racial o étnico, la pertenencia a sindicatos, organizaciones sociales o de derechos humanos, convicciones políticas, religiosas, de la vida sexual, biométricos o datos de la salud. Esta información podrá no ser otorgada por el Titular de estos datos. 12. Aviso de privacidad: Documento físico, electrónico generado por el Responsable del tratamiento que es puesto a disposición del titular con la información relativa a la existencia de las políticas de tratamiento de información que le serán aplicables, la forma de acceder a las mismas y las características del Tratamiento que se pretende dar a los datos personales. DERECHOS QUE TIENEN FRENTE A LA COMPAÑÍA TODOS LOS TITULARES DE DATOS PERSONALES Todo proceso que conlleve el tratamiento por parte de cualquier área de la compañía de datos personales tanto de clientes, proveedores, empleados y en general cualquier tercero con el cual GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. sostenga relaciones comerciales y laborales deberá tener en cuenta e informarle de manera expresa y previa, por cualquier medio del cual se pueda conservar una constancia de su cumplimiento, los derechos que le asisten a ese titular de los datos, los cuáles se enuncian a continuación: 1. Derecho a conocer, actualizar, rectificar, consultar sus datos personales en cualquier momento frente a GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. respecto a los datos que considere parciales, inexactos, incompletos, fraccionados y aquellos que induzcan a error. 2. Derecho a solicitar en cualquier momento una prueba de la autorización otorgada a GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. 3. Derecho a ser informado por GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. previa solicitud del titular de los datos, respecto del uso que le ha dado a los mismos. 4. Derecho a presentar ante la Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio las quejas que considere pertinentes para hacer valer su derecho al Habeas Data frente a la compañía. 5. Derecho a revocar la autorización y/o solicitar la supresión de algún dato cuando considere que GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. no ha respetado sus derechos y garantías constitucionales. 6. Derecho a acceder en forma gratuita a los datos personales que voluntariamente decida compartir con GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S., para lo cual la compañía en ayuda del área de tecnología, se encarga de conservar y archivar de forma segura y confiable los formatos de autorización de cada uno de los titulares de datos personales debidamente otorgadas. CASOS EN LOS CUALES GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. NO REQUIERE AUTORIZACIÓN PARA EL TRATAMIENTO DE LOS DATOS QUE TENGA EN SU PODER 1. Cuando la información sea solicitada a la compañía por una entidad pública o administrativa que esté actuando en ejercicio de sus funciones legales o por orden judicial. 2. Cuando se trate de datos de naturaleza pública debido a que éstos no son protegidos por el ámbito de aplicación de la norma. 3. Eventos de urgencia médica o sanitaria debidamente comprobadas. 4. En aquellos eventos donde la información sea autorizada por la ley para cumplir con fines históricos, estadísticos y científicos. 5. Cuando se trate de datos relacionados con el registro civil de las personas debido a que ésta información no es considerada como un dato de naturaleza privada. A QUIENES SE LES PUEDE ENTREGAR INFORMACIÓN POR PARTE DE GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. SIN NECESIDAD DE CONTAR CON AUTORIZACIÓN DE LOS TITULARES DE LOS DATOS · A los titulares de los datos, sus herederos o representantes en cualquier momento y a través de cualquier medio cuando así lo soliciten a GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. · A las entidades judiciales o administrativas en ejercicio de funciones que eleven algún requerimiento a la compañía para que le sea entregada la información. · A los terceros que sean autorizados por alguna ley de la república de Colombia. · A los terceros a los que el Titular del dato autorice expresamente entregar la información y cuya autorización sea entregada a GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. DEBERES QUE TIENE GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. RESPECTO A LOS TITULARES DE LOS DATOS GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. reconoce que los datos personales son propiedad de los titulares de los mismos y que únicamente tales personas podrán decidir sobre éstos. En este sentido, hará uso exclusivo para aquellas finalidades para las que sea facultado en los términos de la ley y en aras de lo anterior se permite informar los deberes que asume en su calidad de responsable del tratamiento: 1. La compañía deberá buscar el medio a través del cual obtener la autorización expresa por parte del titular de los datos para realizar cualquier tipo de tratamiento. 2. La compañía deberá informar de manera clara y expresa a sus clientes, empleados, proveedores y terceros en general de quienes obtenga bases de datos el tratamiento al cual serán sometidos los mismos y la finalidad de dicho tratamiento. Para ello, la compañía deberá diseñar la estrategia a través de la cual para cada evento, mecánica o solicitud de datos que se realice, informará a los mismos el respectivo tratamiento de que se trate. Algunos de estos medios pueden ser el envío de mensajes de texto, diligenciamiento de formatos físicos, a través de los sitios web de GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. entre otros. 3. La compañía debe informar a los titulares de los datos para cada caso, el carácter facultativo de responder y otorgar la respectiva información solicitada. 4. En todos los casos en los que se recopilen datos, se deberá informar los derechos que le asisten a todos los titulares respecto a sus datos. 5. La compañía debe informar la identificación, dirección física o electrónica y teléfono de la persona o área que tendrá la calidad de responsable del tratamiento. 6. La compañía, deberá garantizar en todo tiempo al titular de la información, el pleno y efectivo ejercicio del derecho al hábeas data y de petición, es decir, la posibilidad de conocer la información que sobre él exista o repose en el banco de datos, solicitar la actualización o corrección de datos y tramitar consultas, todo lo cual se realizará por conducto de los mecanismos de consultas o reclamos previstos en la presente política. 7. La compañía deberá conservar con las debidas seguridades los registros de datos personales almacenados para impedir su deterioro, pérdida, alteración, uso no autorizado o fraudulento y realizar periódica y oportunamente la actualización y rectificación de los datos, cada vez que los titulares de los mismos le reporten novedades o solicitudes. FINALIDADES EN LA CAPTURA, USO Y TRATAMIENTO DE DATOS PERSONALES GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. en el desarrollo de su objeto social y sus relaciones con terceros, entiéndase por estos clientes, empleados, proveedores, acreedores, aliados estratégicos, entre otros; recopila constantemente datos para llevar a cabo diversas finalidades y usos dentro de los cuales se pueden enmarcar: ● Fines administrativos, comerciales, promocionales, informativos, de mercadeo y ventas. ● Ofrecer todo tipo de servicios comerciales; así como realizar campañas de promoción, marketing, publicidad. ● Búsqueda de un conocimiento más cercano con todos sus clientes, proveedores, empleados y terceros vinculados. En relación con lo anterior, GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. podrá ejecutar las siguientes acciones: 1. Obtener, almacenar, compilar, intercambiar, actualizar, recolectar, procesar, reproducir y/o disponer de los datos o información parcial o total de aquellos titulares que le otorguen la debida autorización en los términos exigidos por la ley y en los formatos que para cada caso estime convenientes. 2. Clasificar, ordenar, separar la información suministrada por el titular de los datos. 3. Efectuar investigaciones, comparar, verificar y validar los datos que obtenga en debida forma con centrales de riesgo crediticio con las cuales se tengan relaciones comerciales. 4. Extender la información que obtenga en los términos de la ley de habeas data, a las empresas con las que contrata los servicios de captura, almacenamiento y manejo de sus bases de datos previas las debidas autorizaciones que en ese sentido obtenga. 5. Transferir los datos o información parcial o total a sus filiales, comercios, empresas y/o entidades afiliadas y aliados estratégicos. LA AUTORIZACIÓN A efectos de llevar a cabo los fines anteriormente mencionados, GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. requiere de manera libre, previa, expresa y debidamente informada de la autorización por parte de los titulares de los datos y para ello ha dispuesto mecanismos idóneos garantizando para cada caso que sea posible verificar el otorgamiento de dicha autorización. La misma podrá constar en cualquier medio, bien sea un documento físico, electrónico o en cualquier formato que garantice su posterior consulta a través de herramientas técnicas, tecnológicas y desarrollos de seguridad informática. La autorización es una declaración que informa al titular de los datos la siguiente información: ● Quien es el responsable o encargado de recopilar la información ● Datos recopilados ● Finalidades del tratamiento ● Procedimiento para el ejercicio de los derechos de acceso, corrección, actualización o supresión de datos ● Información sobre recolección de datos sensibles. DATOS RECOLECTADOS ANTES DE LA EXPEDICIÓN DEL DECRETO 1377 DE 2013 Para efectos de dar cumplimiento a lo dispuesto en el artículo 9º de la Ley 1581 de 2012, los Responsables del tratamiento de datos personales establecerán mecanismos para obtener la Autorización de los titulares o de quien se encuentre legitimado en los términos de la Ley. Estos mecanismos podrán ser predeterminados a través de medios técnicos que faciliten al titular su manifestación automatizada. La Autorización podrá otorgarse conforme a alguna de las siguientes opciones: (i) Por escrito, (ii) De forma verbal o (iii) Mediante conductas inequívocas del titular que permitan concluir de manera razonable que otorgó la autorización. En ningún caso el silencio podrá asimilarse a una conducta inequívoca. Así mismo, de conformidad a lo dispuesto en el artículo 10º del Decreto 1377 de 2013, GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. publico en diarios de amplía circulación nacional, el aviso de privacidad a través del cual comunico la existencia de la presente política, informando al respecto a la Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio. Conforme se indica en este Decreto, si en el término de treinta (30) días hábiles a partir de la implementación del anterior mecanismo, los titulares no contactaron al RESPONSABLE o ENCARGADO para solicitar la supresión de sus datos personales, el RESPONSABLE y ENCARGADO podrán continuar realizando el Tratamiento de los datos personales contenidos en sus bases de datos para la finalidad o finalidades previstas e indicadas en la política de tratamiento de la información. PROTECCION DATOS PERSONALES DE MENORES DE EDAD Y ADOLESCENTES En atención a lo dispuesto en la Ley Estatutaria 1581 de 2012 y el Decreto Reglamentario 1377 de 2013, GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. Asegura que el Tratamiento de los datos personales de niños, niñas y adolescentes será realizado respectando sus derechos, razón por la cual, en las actividades comerciales y de mercadeo que realice GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. deberá contar con la autorización previa, expresa e informada del padre o la madre o del representante legal de la niña, niño o adolescente. FORMA DE PROCEDER RESPECTO A LAS CONSULTAS Y SOLICITUDES HECHAS POR LOS TITULARES DE LOS DATOS Todo titular de datos personales tiene derecho a realizar consultas y elevar solicitudes a la compañía respecto al manejo y tratamiento dado a su información. A). PROCEDIMIENTO PARA EL TRÁMITE DE RECLAMOS O SOLICITUDES: Toda solicitud, petición, queja o reclamo (PQR) que sea presentada a GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. por parte de cualquier titular o sus causahabientes respecto al manejo y tratamiento dado a su información será resuelta de conformidad con la ley regulatoria al derecho al habeas data y será tramitado bajo las siguientes reglas: 1. La petición o reclamo se formulará mediante escrito o cualquier otro de los medios definidos en la presente política para tal fin, dirigido a GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S., con la identificación del titular, la descripción de los hechos que dan lugar al reclamo, la dirección o medio a través del cual desea obtener su respuesta, y si fuere el caso, acompañando los documentos de soporte que se quieran hacer valer. En caso de que el escrito resulte incompleto, la compañía solicitará al interesado para que subsane las fallas dentro de los cinco (5) días siguientes a la recepción del reclamo. Transcurridos dos meses desde la fecha del requerimiento, sin que el solicitante presente la información requerida, se entenderá que ha desistido de la reclamación o petición. 2. Una vez recibida la petición o reclamo completo, la compañía incluirá en el registro individual en un término no mayor a dos (2) días hábiles una leyenda que diga \"reclamo en trámite\" y la naturaleza del mismo. Dicha información deberá mantenerse hasta que el reclamo sea decidido. 3. El solicitante recibirá una respuesta por parte de GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. dentro de los diez (10) días hábiles siguientes contados a partir de la fecha en la cual ha tenido conocimiento efectivo de la solicitud. 4. Cuando no fuere posible atender la petición dentro de dicho término, se informará al interesado, expresando los motivos de la demora y señalando la fecha en que se atenderá su petición, la cual en ningún caso podrá superar los cinco (5) días hábiles siguientes al vencimiento del primer término. B). CONSULTAS: La Política de manejo de la información personal por parte de GRUPO 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. y los derechos básicos que los titulares de los datos tienen en relación con la misma podrá ser consultada a través de los siguientes medios:
. ​POLÍTICA MANEJO DE INFORMACIÓN Y DATO.pt: . TIMATIC MANAGEMENT OF PERSONAL INFORMATION AND DATA OF GROUP 1P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. Version: 1Date entered in Vigencia: April  Last updated: February 2019. GENERAL This policy is defined in accordance with the entry into force of Statutory Law  of  which aims to adopt the general provisions for the protection of personal data and to develop the constitutional right of all persons to know, update and correct the information that has been collected on them in databases or archives as well as the right to information; therefore, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., taking into account their status as responsible for the processing of personal data that assists them, is allowed to formulate the present text in order to comply effectively with that regulation and in particular for the personal treatment and handling of the COLOMBIA. The right to HÁBEAS DATA is the right of everyone to know, update and correct the information that has been collected about it in archives and data banks of a public or private nature and guarantees all citizens the power to decide and control their personal information. Therefore, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. welcomes such provisions taking into account that, for the development of its social object, it is continuously collecting and performing various database treatments from both customers, shareholders, suppliers, commercial allies and employees. In accordance with the above, within the legal and corporate duty of GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. to protect the right to privacy of persons, as well as the power to know, update or request information about them in databases, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has designed the present policy of handling personal information and databases in which it describes and explains the processing of Personal Information to which it has access through our website, e-mail, physical information (invoices), text messages, voice messages, and other related, as well as in the face of the current, and other related, commercial, client-related, as in-face, as in-to-face, and-face-to-face, and-to-face, of-to-the-face, and-to-the-face, of-face, and-to-the-the-face, and-face, of-the-face, and-the-side, and-to-the-the-side,. This will be adjusted to the extent that the rules applicable to the subject matter are regulated and new provisions enter into force. GENERAL OBJECTIVE With the implementation of this policy, it is intended to ensure the reservation of information and the security of the treatment that will be given to it to all customers, suppliers, employees and third parties of whom GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has legally obtained information and personal data in accordance with the guidelines established by the law regulating the right to the Habeas Data. In addition, the issuance of this policy is in compliance with the provisions of article  paragraph K, of the Act. DEFINITIONS 17. Authorization: Consent which, in advance, expresses and informs the holder of any personal data for the company to carry out the processing of its personal data. 2. Holder: natural person whose data are processed by the company. 2. Database: Personal data set. 3. Personal data: Information that is linked to a person. It is any piece of information linked to one or more specific or determinable persons or which may be associated with a natural or legal person. Personal data may be public, semi-private or private. 5. Treatment: Any operation or set of operations on personal data that may include collection, storage, use, circulation or suppression. 5. In charge of processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who, by himself or in association with others, does some personal data processing on behalf of the controller. 6. Responsible for processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who by himself or in association with others, decides on the basis of data and / or data processing. 7. Public data: This data is qualified as such in accordance with the mandates of the law or the Constitution. The data contained in public documents, enforceable court decisions which are not subject to reservation and those relating to the civil status of persons are public. 9. Semi-private data: It is semi-private data that is not of an intimate, reserved, or public nature and whose knowledge or dissemination may be of interest not only to its owner but to a certain sector or group of persons or to society at large, such as the financial and credit data of commercial activity. 10. Private data: It is the data that, by its intimate or reserved nature, is only relevant to the holder. 11. Sensitive data: those related to racial or ethnic origin, membership of trade unions, social or human rights organizations, political, religious, sexual, biometric or health data convictions. This information may not be granted by the holder of this data. 12. Privacy Notice: A physical, electronic document generated by the controller that is made available to the holder with information concerning the existence of the information processing policies that will apply to him, the way to access them and the characteristics of the treatment intended to give to the personal data. Any process involving the processing by any area of the personal data company of both customers, suppliers, employees and in general any third party with which GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. maintains commercial and labour relations shall take into account and inform it in an express and prior manner, by any means in which a record of its compliance can be kept, of the rights of that data holder, which are set out below: 1. The right to know, update, correct, consult your personal data at any time against GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. in respect of data that you consider partial, inaccurate, incomplete, fractionated and those that lead to error. 1. The right at any time to request proof of the authorisation granted to Grupo 2P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. 1. The right to be informed by GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. at the request of the data holder regarding the use it has given them. 3. The right to submit to the Superintendency of Industry and Commerce any complaints that it considers relevant to assert its right to the Habeas Data vis-à-vis the company. 4. The right to revoke the authorisation and / or request the deletion of any information where it considers that GROUP 5P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has not respected its constitutional rights and guarantees. 1. The right to free access to personal data that it voluntarily decides to share with GROUP 6P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., for which the company in support of the technology area is responsible for the safe and reliable storage and archiving of the authorization formats of each of the duly granted personal data holders. CASES IN WHICH GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. IS NOT REQUIRED FOR THE TREATMENT OF DATA IN THEIR POWER 1. Where the information is requested from the company by a public or administrative entity acting in the exercise of its legal or judicial functions. 1. In the case of public data because they are not protected by the scope of the rule. 2. Medical or health emergency events duly tested. 3. In those events where information is authorized by law to meet historical, statistical and scientific purposes. 4. In the case of data relating to the civil registration of persons because this information is not considered to be a data of a private nature. WHO CAN INTER INFORMATION BY GROUP 5P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. WITHOUT A NEED TO CONNECESSY WITH THE AUTHORISATION OF DATA PORTS · To the data holders, their heirs or representatives at any time and through any means upon request to GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. · To the judicial or administrative entities in the exercise of functions that raise a request to the company for the information to be given. · To third parties who are authorized by some law of the Republic of Colombia. · To the third parties to which the Data Holder expressly authorizes to deliver the information and whose authorization is given to GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. MUST HAVE GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. WITH REGARD TO THE DATA TEMPERS COLOMBIA S.A.S. recognizes that the personal data is the property of the data holders and that only such persons may decide on them. In this sense, it will use exclusively for those purposes for which it is empowered in the terms of the law and for the sake of the above, it is allowed to inform the duties it assumes as responsible for the treatment: 1. The company shall seek the means through which to obtain the express authorisation of the data holder to carry out any type of treatment. 1. The company shall inform its customers, employees, suppliers and third parties in general of those who obtain databases of the treatment to which they will be subjected and the purpose of such treatment. To this end, the company shall design the strategy through which for each event, mechanics or data request to be carried out, it shall inform them of the relevant processing. Some of these means can be the sending of text messages, the handling of physical formats, through the websites of Grupo 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. among others. 1. The company must inform the data holders on a case-by-case basis of the optional nature of responding and granting the information requested. 3. In all cases where data are collected, the rights of all holders in respect of their data shall be informed. 4. The company must inform the identification, physical or electronic address and telephone of the person or area that will be responsible for the treatment. 5. The company shall at all times ensure that the holder of the information, the full and effective exercise of the right to habeas data and on request, that is, the possibility to know the information on it or to rest in the database, to request the updating or correction of data and to process consultations, all of which shall be done through the consultation mechanisms or claims provided for in this policy. 7. The company shall keep the records of personal data stored with due certainty to prevent their deterioration, loss, alteration, unauthorized or fraudulent use and shall regularly and in a timely manner update and rectification of the data, each time the holders of the data report to it news or requests. FINALITIES IN THE CAPTURE, USE AND TREATMENT OF PERSONAL DATA GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. in the development of their social object and their relations with third parties, understand by these customers, employees, suppliers, creditors, strategic allies, among others; constantly collect data to carry out various purposes and uses within which can be framed: ● Administrative, commercial, promotional, information, marketing and sales purposes. ● To offer all kinds of commercial services; as well as to conduct promotional, marketing, advertising campaigns. ● Search for closer knowledge with all your customers, suppliers, employees and related third parties. In relation to the above, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. may implement the following actions: 1. To obtain, store, compile, exchange, update, collect, process, reproduce and / or dispose of the partial or total data or information of those holders who give you the appropriate authorization in the terms required by law and in such formats as you consider appropriate for each case. 2. Classify, order, separate the information provided by the data holder. 2. To carry out investigations, compare, verify and validate the data you obtain in due form with credit risk plants with which you have business relations. 3. Extend the information it obtains in the terms of the habeas data law to the companies with which it contracts the services of capture, storage and management of its previous databases the appropriate authorizations it obtains in that regard. 5. Transfer partial or total data or information to its subsidiaries, businesses, companies and / or affiliated entities and strategic allies. PROCEDURE FOR THE TRANSMIT OF CLAIMS OR REQUEST: Any application, request, complaint or claim (PQR) submitted to GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. by any holder or his / her reasons for the handling and treatment of his / her information shall be decided in accordance with the law regulating the right to have data and shall be processed under the following rules: 1. The request or claim shall be made by writing or any other means defined in this policy for this purpose, addressed to GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., with the identification of the holder, the description of the facts that give rise to the claim, the address or means through which it wishes to obtain its response, and, if necessary, accompanying the supporting documents that are to be made available. After two months from the date of the request, without the applicant submitting the requested information, it shall be understood to have withdrawn the claim or request. 2. Once the request or full claim has been received, the company shall include in the individual register in a term not exceeding two (2) working days a legend that says\ "claim in process\" and the nature of it. The applicant shall receive a reply from GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. within 10 (10) working days from the date on which he has had effective knowledge of the application. 4. GENERAL This policy is defined in accordance with the entry into force of Statutory Law  of  which aims to adopt the general provisions for the protection of personal data and to develop the constitutional right of all persons to know, update and correct the information that has been collected on them in databases or archives as well as the right to information; therefore, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., taking into account their status as responsible for the processing of personal data that assists them, is allowed to formulate the present text in order to comply effectively with that regulation and in particular for the personal treatment and handling of the COLOMBIA. The right to HÁBEAS DATA is the right of everyone to know, update and correct the information that has been collected about it in archives and data banks of a public or private nature and guarantees all citizens the power to decide and control their personal information. Therefore, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. welcomes such provisions taking into account that, for the development of its social object, it is continuously collecting and performing various database treatments from both customers, shareholders, suppliers, commercial allies and employees. In accordance with the above, within the legal and corporate duty of GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. to protect the right to privacy of persons, as well as the power to know, update or request information about them in databases, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has designed the present policy of handling personal information and databases in which it describes and explains the processing of Personal Information to which it has access through our website, e-mail, physical information (invoices), text messages, voice messages, and other related, as well as in the face of the current, and other related, commercial, client-related, as in-face, as in-to-face, and-face-to-face, and-to-face, of-to-the-face, and-to-the-face, of-face, and-to-the-the-face, and-face, of-the-face, and-the-side, and-to-the-the-side,. This will be adjusted to the extent that the rules applicable to the subject matter are regulated and new provisions enter into force. GENERAL OBJECTIVE With the implementation of this policy, it is intended to ensure the reservation of information and the security of the treatment that will be given to it to all customers, suppliers, employees and third parties of whom GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has legally obtained information and personal data in accordance with the guidelines established by the law regulating the right to the Habeas Data. In addition, the issuance of this policy is in compliance with the provisions of article  paragraph K, of the Act. DEFINITIONS 17. Authorization: Consent which, in advance, expresses and informs the holder of any personal data for the company to carry out the processing of its personal data. 2. Holder: natural person whose data are processed by the company. 2. Database: Personal data set. 3. Personal data: Information that is linked to a person. It is any piece of information linked to one or more specific or determinable persons or which may be associated with a natural or legal person. Personal data may be public, semi-private or private. 5. Treatment: Any operation or set of operations on personal data that may include collection, storage, use, circulation or suppression. 5. In charge of processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who, by himself or in association with others, does some personal data processing on behalf of the controller. 6. Responsible for processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who by himself or in association with others, decides on the basis of data and / or data processing. 7. Public data: This data is qualified as such in accordance with the mandates of the law or the Constitution. The data contained in public documents, enforceable court decisions which are not subject to reservation and those relating to the civil status of persons are public. 9. Semi-private data: It is semi-private data that is not of an intimate, reserved, or public nature and whose knowledge or dissemination may be of interest not only to its owner but to a certain sector or group of persons or to society at large, such as the financial and credit data of commercial activity. 10. Private data: It is the data that, by its intimate or reserved nature, is only relevant to the holder. 11. Sensitive data: those related to racial or ethnic origin, membership of trade unions, social or human rights organizations, political, religious, sexual, biometric or health data convictions. This information may not be granted by the holder of this data. 12. Privacy Notice: A physical, electronic document generated by the controller that is made available to the holder with information concerning the existence of the information processing policies that will apply to him, the way to access them and the characteristics of the treatment intended to give to the personal data. Any process involving the processing by any area of the personal data company of both customers, suppliers, employees and in general any third party with which GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. maintains commercial and labour relations shall take into account and inform it in an express and prior manner, by any means in which a record of its compliance can be kept, of the rights of that data holder, which are set out below: 1. The right to know, update, correct, consult your personal data at any time against GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. in respect of data that you consider partial, inaccurate, incomplete, fractionated and those that lead to error. 1. The right at any time to request proof of the authorisation granted to Grupo 2P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. 1. The right to be informed by GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. at the request of the data holder regarding the use it has given them. 3. The right to submit to the Superintendency of Industry and Commerce any complaints that it considers relevant to assert its right to the Habeas Data vis-à-vis the company. 4. The right to revoke the authorisation and / or request the deletion of any information where it considers that GROUP 5P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has not respected its constitutional rights and guarantees. 1. The right to free access to personal data that it voluntarily decides to share with GROUP 6P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., for which the company in support of the technology area is responsible for the safe and reliable storage and archiving of the authorization formats of each of the duly granted personal data holders. CASES IN WHICH GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. IS NOT REQUIRED FOR THE TREATMENT OF DATA IN THEIR POWER 1. Where the information is requested from the company by a public or administrative entity acting in the exercise of its legal or judicial functions. 1. In the case of public data because they are not protected by the scope of the rule. 2. Medical or health emergency events duly tested. 3. In those events where information is authorized by law to meet historical, statistical and scientific purposes. 4. In the case of data relating to the civil registration of persons because this information is not considered to be a data of a private nature. WHO CAN INTER INFORMATION BY GROUP 5P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. MUST HAVE GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. GENERAL This policy is defined in accordance with the entry into force of Statutory Law  of  which aims to adopt the general provisions for the protection of personal data and to develop the constitutional right of all persons to know, update and correct the information that has been collected on them in databases or archives as well as the right to information; therefore, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., taking into account their status as responsible for the processing of personal data that assists them, is allowed to formulate the present text in order to comply effectively with that regulation and in particular for the personal treatment and handling of the COLOMBIA. The right to HÁBEAS DATA is the right of everyone to know, update and correct the information that has been collected about it in archives and data banks of a public or private nature and guarantees all citizens the power to decide and control their personal information. Therefore, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. welcomes such provisions taking into account that, for the development of its social object, it is continuously collecting and performing various database treatments from both customers, shareholders, suppliers, commercial allies and employees. In accordance with the above, within the legal and corporate duty of GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. to protect the right to privacy of persons, as well as the power to know, update or request information about them in databases, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has designed the present policy of handling personal information and databases in which it describes and explains the processing of Personal Information to which it has access through our website, e-mail, physical information (invoices), text messages, voice messages, and other related, as well as in the face of the current, and other related, commercial, client-related, as in-face, as in-to-face, and-face-to-face, and-to-face, of-to-the-face, and-to-the-face, of-face, and-to-the-the-face, and-face, of-the-face, and-the-side, and-to-the-the-side,. This will be adjusted to the extent that the rules applicable to the subject matter are regulated and new provisions enter into force. GENERAL OBJECTIVE With the implementation of this policy, it is intended to ensure the reservation of information and the security of the treatment that will be given to it to all customers, suppliers, employees and third parties of whom GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has legally obtained information and personal data in accordance with the guidelines established by the law regulating the right to the Habeas Data. In addition, the issuance of this policy is in compliance with the provisions of article  paragraph K, of the Act. DEFINITIONS 17. Authorization: Consent which, in advance, expresses and informs the holder of any personal data for the company to carry out the processing of its personal data. 2. Holder: natural person whose data are processed by the company. 2. Database: Personal data set. 3. Personal data: Information that is linked to a person. It is any piece of information linked to one or more specific or determinable persons or which may be associated with a natural or legal person. Personal data may be public, semi-private or private. 5. Treatment: Any operation or set of operations on personal data that may include collection, storage, use, circulation or suppression. 5. In charge of processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who, by himself or in association with others, does some personal data processing on behalf of the controller. 6. Responsible for processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who by himself or in association with others, decides on the basis of data and / or data processing. 7. Public data: This data is qualified as such in accordance with the mandates of the law or the Constitution. The data contained in public documents, enforceable court decisions which are not subject to reservation and those relating to the civil status of persons are public. 9. Semi-private data: It is semi-private data that is not of an intimate, reserved, or public nature and whose knowledge or dissemination may be of interest not only to its owner but to a certain sector or group of persons or to society at large, such as the financial and credit data of commercial activity. 10. Private data: It is the data that, by its intimate or reserved nature, is only relevant to the holder. 11. Sensitive data: those related to racial or ethnic origin, membership of trade unions, social or human rights organizations, political, religious, sexual, biometric or health data convictions. This information may not be granted by the holder of this data. 12. Privacy Notice: A physical, electronic document generated by the controller that is made available to the holder with information concerning the existence of the information processing policies that will apply to him, the way to access them and the characteristics of the treatment intended to give to the personal data. Any process involving the processing by any area of the personal data company of both customers, suppliers, employees and in general any third party with which GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. maintains commercial and labour relations shall take into account and inform it in an express and prior manner, by any means in which a record of its compliance can be kept, of the rights of that data holder, which are set out below: 1. The right to know, update, correct, consult your personal data at any time against GROUP 1P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. in respect of data that you consider partial, inaccurate, incomplete, fractionated and those that lead to error. 1. The right at any time to request proof of the authorisation granted to Grupo 2P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. 1. The right to be informed by GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. at the request of the data holder regarding the use it has given them. 3. The right to submit to the Superintendency of Industry and Commerce any complaints that it considers relevant to assert its right to the Habeas Data vis-à-vis the company. 4. The right to revoke the authorisation and / or request the deletion of any information where it considers that GROUP 5P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has not respected its constitutional rights and guarantees. 1. The right to free access to personal data that it voluntarily decides to share with GROUP 6P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., for which the company in support of the technology area is responsible for the safe and reliable storage and archiving of the authorization formats of each of the duly granted personal data holders. CASES IN WHICH GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. IS NOT REQUIRED FOR THE TREATMENT OF DATA IN THEIR POWER 1. Where the information is requested from the company by a public or administrative entity acting in the exercise of its legal or judicial functions. 1. In the case of public data because they are not protected by the scope of the rule. 2. Medical or health emergency events duly tested. 3. In those events where information is authorized by law to meet historical, statistical and scientific purposes. 4. In the case of data relating to the civil registration of persons because this information is not considered to be a data of a private nature. WHO CAN INTER INFORMATION BY GROUP 5P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. The company shall keep the records of personal data stored with due certainty to prevent their deterioration, loss, alteration, unauthorized or fraudulent use and shall regularly and in a timely manner update and rectification of the data, each time the holders of the data report to it news or requests. DATA RECOLLECTED BEFORE THE EXPEDITION OF THE DECENT 1377 OF 2013 In order to comply with article 9 of Law 9 of 1581, the persons responsible for the processing of personal data shall establish mechanisms to obtain the authorization of the holders or of those who are entitled under the terms of the Act. Authorization: Consent which, in advance, expresses and informs the holder of any personal data for the company to carry out the processing of its personal data. 2. Holder: natural person whose data are processed by the company. 2. Database: Personal data set. 3. Personal data: Information that is linked to a person. It is any piece of information linked to one or more specific or determinable persons or which may be associated with a natural or legal person. Personal data may be public, semi-private or private. 5. Treatment: Any operation or set of operations on personal data that may include collection, storage, use, circulation or suppression. 5. In charge of processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who, by himself or in association with others, does some personal data processing on behalf of the controller. 6. Responsible for processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who by himself or in association with others, decides on the basis of data and / or data processing. 7. Public data: This data is qualified as such in accordance with the mandates of the law or the Constitution. The data contained in public documents, enforceable court decisions which are not subject to reservation and those relating to the civil status of persons are public. 9. Semi-private data: It is semi-private data that is not of an intimate, reserved, or public nature and whose knowledge or dissemination may be of interest not only to its owner but to a certain sector or group of persons or to society at large, such as the financial and credit data of commercial activity. 10. Private data: It is the data that, by its intimate or reserved nature, is only relevant to the holder. 11. Sensitive data: those related to racial or ethnic origin, membership of trade unions, social or human rights organizations, political, religious, sexual, biometric or health data convictions. This information may not be granted by the holder of this data. 12. GENERAL This policy is defined in accordance with the entry into force of Statutory Law  of  which aims to adopt the general provisions for the protection of personal data and to develop the constitutional right of all persons to know, update and correct the information that has been collected on them in databases or archives as well as the right to information; therefore, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S., taking into account their status as responsible for the processing of personal data that assists them, is allowed to formulate the present text in order to comply effectively with that regulation and in particular for the personal treatment and handling of the COLOMBIA. The right to HÁBEAS DATA is the right of everyone to know, update and correct the information that has been collected about it in archives and data banks of a public or private nature and guarantees all citizens the power to decide and control their personal information. Therefore, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. welcomes such provisions taking into account that, for the development of its social object, it is continuously collecting and performing various database treatments from both customers, shareholders, suppliers, commercial allies and employees. In accordance with the above, within the legal and corporate duty of GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. to protect the right to privacy of persons, as well as the power to know, update or request information about them in databases, GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has designed the present policy of handling personal information and databases in which it describes and explains the processing of Personal Information to which it has access through our website, e-mail, physical information (invoices), text messages, voice messages, and other related, as well as in the face of the current, and other related, commercial, client-related, as in-face, as in-to-face, and-face-to-face, and-to-face, of-to-the-face, and-to-the-face, of-face, and-to-the-the-face, and-face, of-the-face, and-the-side, and-to-the-the-side,. GENERAL OBJECTIVE With the implementation of this policy, it is intended to ensure the reservation of information and the security of the treatment that will be given to it to all customers, suppliers, employees and third parties of whom GROUP 3P3 COLOMBIA S.A.S. has legally obtained information and personal data in accordance with the guidelines established by the law regulating the right to the Habeas Data. In addition, the issuance of this policy is in compliance with the provisions of article  paragraph K, of the Act. DEFINITIONS 17. Authorization: Consent which, in advance, expresses and informs the holder of any personal data for the company to carry out the processing of its personal data. 2. Holder: natural person whose data are processed by the company. 2. Database: Personal data set. 3. Personal data: Information that is linked to a person. It is any piece of information linked to one or more specific or determinable persons or which may be associated with a natural or legal person. Personal data may be public, semi-private or private. 5. Treatment: Any operation or set of operations on personal data that may include collection, storage, use, circulation or suppression. 5. In charge of processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who, by himself or in association with others, does some personal data processing on behalf of the controller. 6. Responsible for processing: a natural or legal person, public or private, who by himself or in association with others, decides on the basis of data and / or data processing. 7. Public data: This data is qualified as such in accordance with the mandates of the law or the Constitution. The data contained in public documents, enforceable court decisions which are not subject to reservation and those relating to the civil status of persons are public. 9. Semi-private data: It is semi-private data that is not of an intimate, reserved, or public nature and whose knowledge or dissemination may be of interest not only to its owner but to a certain sector or group of persons or to society at large, such as the financial and credit data of commercial activity. 10. Private data: It is the data that, by its intimate or reserved nature, is only relevant to the holder. 11. Sensitive data: those related to racial or ethnic origin, membership of trade unions, social or human rights organizations, political, religious, sexual, biometric or health data convictions. This information may not be granted by the holder of this data. 12. Privacy Notice: A physical, electronic document generated by the controller that is made available to the holder with information concerning the existence of the information processing policies that will apply to him, the way to access them and the characteristics of the treatment intended to give to the personal data. . POLITICAS DE SEGURIDAD INFORMÁTICA par.en: . Information security policies for Group 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. are essential and priority to adopt technical, legal, human and administrative measures that are necessary to ensure the security of personal data by protecting confidentiality, integrity, use, unauthorized and / or fraudulent access. It is also allowed to report that the company has internally implemented mandatory security protocols for all personnel with access to personal data and information systems. The internal security policies under which the information of the holder is kept to prevent their adulteration, loss, consultation, use or unauthorized or fraudulent access are as follows: 1. Policies in the perimetral technological infrastructure in the data network (Intruder Prevention System (IPS), Firewalls, secure mail, content control, NAC network access control, antivirus and anti-malware). 2. Technology infrastructure policies and information access control policies, applications and databases (Platform MS active directory, security modules, PGP encryption). 3. Technology implementation policies that minimize the risk of disaster critical platforms (DRP Disaster Recovery Plan). 4. Technology implementation policies that protect malware organization computers and servers. 5. Technology implementation policies that prevent the use of USB devices from unauthorized storage. 6. Technology implementation policies that control electronic shipping and transmission characterized as confidential (DLP - Data Loss Prevention-, Transfer). 7. Using different environments on critical platforms, so that developers and consultants can work smoothly (DEV development, QA quality and PDN Productive). 8. Technology implementation policies that support the information contained in the various platforms. 9. Written policy on information security and the use of information tools. 10. Confidentiality agreement with suppliers and third parties. 11. The confidentiality clause in employment contracts for employees. 12. Self-control and response procedures for internal and external audit. 13. All events that take place, in which customer information is captured, include the Habeas data paragraph, with their respective implications. 14. Habeas Data Warning. GROUP 3P1 COLOMBIA S.A.S. ensures that it complies with the protection of personal data provided by its customers under the provisions of the regulatory regulation of the right to HABEAS DATA, for which it is allowed to report: 1. That the right of habeas data is the right of every person to know, update and rectify, free of charge, the information that has been collected about it in public or private files and data banks. 2. That the customer as the holder of the information will be able to access its data at any time, so that it will be able to modify, correct, update, revoke and request proof of the authorization given if it is considered through this medium or through the customer service offices of the warehouses throughout the country. 3.
